title: US charges Cuba's Raúl Castro with murder over 1996 downing of two planes
snippet: Castro and five others are charged with conspiracy to kill US nationals, murder, and destruction of aircraft

title: Rosenberg: Putin enjoys Xi's Chinese welcome but heads home without pipeline deal
snippet: Russia and China showed they were shoulder-to-shoulder on the world stage, but it became clear there are limits, says the BBC's Russia Editor.

title: Far-right Israeli minister condemned for taunting handcuffed Gaza flotilla activists
snippet: France and Italy are among the countries that have criticised a video showing Itamar Ben-Gvir taunting dozens of activists detained at an Israeli port.

title: Ebola vaccine could take nine months as death toll rises further, WHO warns
snippet: In its latest update, the World Health Organization says there have now been 139 suspected deaths and 600 cases.

title: Murder or accident? Mystery of Mango tycoon's hiking death after son's arrest
snippet: Isak Andic's son Jonathan denies involvement in the fatal fall of his father, who founded one of Europe's biggest clothing empires.

title: Austrian ex-intelligence officer found guilty of Russia spying charges
snippet: The spy scandal has revived fears that Austria remains a hotbed of Russian espionage activity.

title: US military jets and drones tracked near Cuba as tensions rise
snippet: Tracking data shows several flights by US Navy reconnaissance jets and drones during the last week.

title: Whale to be removed from Danish island after failed German rescue
snippet: Danish officials will conduct a post mortem examination on the whale, which was released into the sea from a barge more than two weeks ago.

title: Barney Frank: One of the first openly gay US congressmen dies aged 86
snippet: After a decades-long career in Congress, he spent his final weeks in hospice care at his home in Maine.

title: Tesla Cybertruck driver arrested after driving into lake to use 'wade mode', police say
snippet: Police said the vehicle was abandoned by the driver after it took on water near the shoreline of Grapevine Lake in north Texas.

title: SpaceX files for IPO that could make Elon Musk a trillionaire
snippet: Musk's rocket-maker and satellite internet provider will trade under the ticker SPCX

title: US groups urge investigation into child safety and spending on Roblox
snippet: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.

title: Google to release first smart glasses since Google Glass flop
snippet: The glasses will go on sale sometime in autumn and allow Google's artificial intelligence product to interact with a user.

title: Zoe Kleinman: Why the AI industry is the real winner of the Musk-Altman trial
snippet: The trial in Oakland, California has helped lift the veil on the AI sector - and the huge egos of the men at the heart of it.

title: Elon Musk has lost yet another legal battle. Why he'll still keep fighting
snippet: Musk has lost his high-profile lawsuit against OpenAI, but is not likely to change his aggressive style.
